data.body: B2 depends on the batch-runner seam designed in docs/design/batch-runner-seam.md (B1). Under that design, B2's plan-review workflow batch step is declarative: {prompt: plan-review-finder, criteria: [registry-assembled {prompt, when?}], model_ladder}; usd_budget optional (runner computes plan_budget_cap from reconstructed PlanContext). The interpreter resolves overlay  inclusion before the runner. See the design note's 'What B2's batch step looks like' section.
